why: Protocol 775 Configuration keep_alive runtime reaction must be proven at the actual Stevenarella reader loop, not only at packet decode/map/send helper layers. The full spawn_reader proof must feed the official Configuration clientbound keep_alive frame into the reader loop and observe the official Configuration serverbound keep_alive response frame for the same id.
what: The exact Rust oracle test configuration_keepalive_runtime_spawn_reader_reaction_echoes_official_frame fails after validating the official inbound and outbound keep_alive answer artifacts because the reset-proof oracle crate cannot execute stevenarella/src/server/mod.rs Server::spawn_reader in Configuration state. Server::spawn_reader is private, and the public Server::connect path sets Conn state to Play before connect0/spawn_reader, so there is no current public/root-owned harness surface for the actual Configuration spawn_reader keep_alive reaction path.

answer.expected_network_shape: For both inbound and outbound with Conn compression_threshold -1: VarInt(length of official encoded_framed_hex bytes) followed by the official encoded_framed_hex bytes.

evidence.summary: Existing generated official answer from client.jar calls: ConfigurationProtocols.CLIENTBOUND.codec().encode/decode, CLIENTBOUND_TEMPLATE.details().listPackets, and ClientboundKeepAlivePacket.getId().
Existing generated official answer from client.jar calls: ConfigurationProtocols.SERVERBOUND.codec().encode/decode, SERVERBOUND_TEMPLATE.details().listPackets, and ServerboundKeepAlivePacket.getId().
Runtime manifest declares the exact spawn_reader reaction probe and reuses the official clientbound/serverbound keep_alive framed answers as the expected input/output frame sources.

Rust oracle test reads the runtime manifest and both official answers, validates packet type/class/id agreement, then fails at the current harness boundary instead of reducing the claim to the already-proven protocol echo path.

Current source contains private fn spawn_reader(mut read: protocol::Conn, server: Arc<Mutex<Option<Arc<Server>>>>) with a MappedPacket::KeepAliveClientbound branch, while public Server::connect sets Conn state to Play before connect0/spawn_reader.

observed_failure: root-owned runtime probe cannot yet execute the actual Configuration spawn_reader keep_alive reaction: Server::spawn_reader is private and the public Server::connect path reaches spawn_reader only after setting Conn state to Play.
